stanzas.label: Verse 1
stanzas.text:
Colours that I see
Mean so much to me
Red and yellow, black, blue and green
Every single shade has a story inlaid
Colours mean so much to me

stanzas.label: Verse 2
stanzas.text:
White shows the holiness of God
Gold tells of heaven above
Black shows the state of my heart
Red shows the measure of His love.

stanzas.label: Verse 1
stanzas.text:
Love the Lord your God
With all your heart and all your soul
And all your mind and love for all mankind
As you would love yourself and
Love the Lord your God with all your heart
And all your soul and mind
And love for mankind.

stanzas.label: Verse 2
stanzas.text:
We've got Christian lives to live
We've got Jesus' love to give
We've got nothing to hide
Because in him we abide
        The Lord...............

stanzas.label: Verse 1
stanzas.text:
What's impossible with man
Is possible with God - 2
He can do everything
For nothing is too hard
What's impossible to you
Be sure He can do
Praise His name
He's the God of impossible. - 2

stanzas.label: Verse 1
stanzas.text:
He's still working on me
To make me what I ought to be
It took Him just a week
To make the Moon and the Stars
The Sun and the Earth
And Jupiter and Mars
How loving and patient He must be
He's still working on me!

stanzas.label: Verse 2
stanzas.text:
There really ought to be a sign upon my heart
"Don't judge me yet, there's an unfinished part"
But I'll be perfect just according to His plan
Fashioned by the Master's loving hand.

stanzas.label: Verse 3
stanzas.text:
In mirror of His word, reflections that I see
Make me wonder why he never gave up on me
He loves me as I am and helps me when I pray
Remember He's the potter I'm the clay.

stanzas.label: Verse 1
stanzas.text:
Let's talk about Jesus
The King of Kings is He
The Lord of Lords supreme
Through all eternity
The great I am the way
The Truth, the Life, the Door
Let's talk about Jesus
More and more.

stanzas.label: Verse 1
stanzas.text:
आज हम बताते हैं Something Something
आज हम से सुन लो तुम
Everything Everything
न कोई magic न कोई tragic
न कोई zing thing
लेकिन Something good thing big thing
सबसे Superthing
ईश्वर ने दुनिया से Love किया
अपना Begotten Son दिया
क्रूस पर मारा गया, पूरा किया Everything
उसने हमें Holy किया, दूर किया every sin.

stanzas.label: Verse 1
stanzas.text:
यहोवा परमेश्वर, यहोवा मेरा प्रभु,
यहोवा मेरा राजा, यहोवा तारणहारा।

stanzas.label: Chorus
stanzas.text:
El-Shaddai, El-Shaddai
सर्वशक्तिमान तू है। - 2

Ebenezer, Ebenezer,
आज तक तू मेरे साथ है। - 2

title: For I'm building a people of power

stanzas.label: Verse 1
stanzas.text:
For I'm building a people of power
And I'm building a people of praise
Who will move through this land by my Spirit
And will glorify My precious name.

stanzas.label: Verse 2
stanzas.text:
Build your church Lord, Make us strong Lord
Join our hearts Lord, through your Son
Make us one Lord, In your body
In the kingdom of your Son.

stanzas.label: Verse 1
stanzas.text:
ऐ खुदा तू है बड़ा
ऐ खुदा ते है सदा
ऐ खुदा तू पाक है
ऐ खुदा तू शक्ति है
जिन्दगी के सोते में मुझे
जिन्दगी पाने को तू चला।

stanzas.label: Verse 2
stanzas.text:
आ जा मेरे जिन्दा खुदा
जिन्दगी के राहों में चला
जिन्दगी के सोते में मुझे
जिन्दगी पाने को तू चला।

stanzas.label: Verse 1
stanzas.text:
एक लड़ाई लड़नी है
और एक दौड़ दौड़ना है
सामना करना है सब खतरों का
यीशु मेरा प्रकाश मेरे जीवन की आस
वह है बल मेरी आत्मा का
है भरोसा वही मुक्तिदाता वही
उसकी आज्ञा को मान ला ईमान
यीशु मेरा प्रकाश मेरे जीवन की आस
वह है बल मेरी आत्मा का।
